Notice Of Motion To Transfer Action To Santa Cruz County Superior Court [Ccp 397]
Off Calendar May-31-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: PLAINTIFFS JAMES CURRY, JUDY MARR'S MOTION TO TRANSFER ACTION TO SANTA CRUZ COUNTY SUPERIOR COURT [CCP 397]. No appearances. The court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: denied. The witnesses and issue in the San Francisco and Santa Cruz cases are different and there is little or no witness overlaps. Prevailing party to submit a proposed form of order. (302/LMG) Judge: Loretta M. Giorgi; Reporter: Karla Ellis-Davis, CSR #12998
